mapper.select:
SELECT d.device_code, d.device_name, d.monitor_type, r.monitor_value, r.monitor_location, d.install_address, r.last_collect_time FROM tbl_device d LEFT JOIN station_device_record r ON r.id = ( SELECT id FROM station_device_record WHERE device_id = d.id AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY last_collect_time DESC LIMIT 1 ) WHERE d.deleted = 0
AND r.station_id = #{request.stationId}
AND d.device_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{request.deviceCode}, '%')
AND d.device_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{request.deviceName}, '%')
AND d.monitor_type LIKE CONCAT('%', #{request.monitorType}, '%')
ORDER BY r.last_collect_time DESC

SELECT d.device_code, d.device_name, d.monitor_type, r.monitor_value, r.monitor_location, d.install_address, r.last_collect_time, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM warning_device w WHERE w.device_id = d.id AND w.verify_result = '隐患' AND w.deleted = 0 ) AS unprocessed_warning, r.running_status FROM tbl_device d LEFT JOIN station_device_record r ON r.id = ( SELECT id FROM station_device_record WHERE device_id = d.id AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY last_collect_time DESC LIMIT 1 ) WHERE d.deleted = 0
AND r.station_id = #{request.stationId}
AND d.device_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{request.deviceCode}, '%')
AND d.device_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{request.deviceName}, '%')
AND d.monitor_type LIKE CONCAT('%', #{request.monitorType}, '%')
ORDER BY r.last_collect_time DESC

SELECT d.device_code AS deviceCode, d.device_name AS deviceName, d.monitor_type AS monitorType, d.device_model AS deviceModel, d.manufacturer, d.`range`, d.threshold_upper AS thresholdUpper, d.install_address AS installAddress, d.monitoring_point AS monitoringPoint, d.real_time_voltage AS realTimeVoltage, d.real_time_power AS realTimePower, r.running_status AS runningStatus FROM tbl_device d LEFT JOIN station_device_record r ON r.id = ( SELECT id FROM station_device_record WHERE device_id = d.id AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY last_collect_time DESC LIMIT 1 ) WHERE d.device_code = #{deviceCode} AND d.deleted = 0
